title: coleus megacalyx
intro: Coleus megacalyx, also known as the giant coleus or wild coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, the leaves of Coleus megacalyx have been used in herbal medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic practices, due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Coleus megacalyx are said to include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, as well as possessing antimicrobial properties that can help fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Coleus megacalyx are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the leaves in a decoction or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
